title: Most organisations cannot measure AI marketing returns despite rising investment, Comviva survey finds
description: 90% of organizations raised AI marketing budgets over two years, but only 12% can show what that spending actually returned. Most rely on estimates, and 67% can't even determine their total AI costs.

title: AI Is Making Hackers Smarter — And Palo Alto And CrowdStrike Richer
description: AI is making cyberattacks more sophisticated, creating a major opportunity for cybersecurity leaders Palo Alto Networks and CrowdStrike. title: YouTube AI Feed: Ask for Videos, Get a Custom Feed
description: AI YouTube Feed is making the process of discovering videos a dialogue. It is not just about using the algorithm on the homepage, but also allowing the users to input what they are looking for to generate an individualized feed.
